The '''''Vainglorious''-class cruiser''' was a [[Warship/Legends|warship]] produced by [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]] prior to the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SS">''[[Stock Ships]]''</ref>

==History==
''Vainglorious''-class cruisers were used by the [[Stark Commercial Combine]] during the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]].<ref name="EGtW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

As of the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the ''Vainglorious''-class [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] was a defunct [[Starship/Legends|starship]] model. Surplus [[autochef]]s from this class were recycled as part of the no-frills interior of the [[Starlight-class light freighter|''Starlight''-class light freighter]].<ref name="SS">''[[Stock Ships]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
